title: Euphorbia klokoviana
taxonomy: Euphorbia klokoviana is classified in the family Euphorbiaceae, commonly known as the spurge family. This family is part of the order Malpighiales in the clade rosids. The order Malpighiales is a part of the subclass Rosidae, which is in the class Magnoliopsida, or dicotyledons. The class Magnoliopsida is part of the division Magnoliophyta, also known as flowering plants. This division is in the kingdom Plantae.
